# CircleQuestionMark

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CircleQuestionMark;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CircleQuestionMark { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
question mark

accessibility, text, notifications
